subcodes.first_line: O ye two ancient servants of the manifest Light! From the very beginning of your acceptance of the Faith in the Days of God, ye have arisen to serve His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده دیرین نور مبین از بدایت تصدیق در ایام الله بر خدمت امر الله قیام
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
